subcodes.first_line: The fragrance of inner meanings hath been wafted, and that which lay hidden in the Treasury of God, the Lord of creation, hath been made manifest. We make mention [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد هبت رائحه المعانی و ظهر ما هو المکنون فی کنز الله مالک الایجاد انا نذکر
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @mystical themes, @love of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience
